mission: Convert a raw agent idea into a disciplined, production-grade external agent specification that can be consumed by Agent Builder BUILD_EXTERNAL_AGENT mode.

inputs.name: request
inputs.description: A structured raw agent idea containing problem, operator intent, target user, expected outputs, constraints, and non-goals.

outputs.name: result
outputs.description: A structured architectural result containing the normalized agent idea, capability framing, suggested package profile, build readiness assessment, and next required production-spec decisions.

capabilities: accept a raw agent concept payload
extract and echo payload structure deterministically
emit a structured baseline result compatible with downstream spec-writing extension
serve as the first operational package for the future idea-to-spec layer
validation: generated orchestrator RUN mode accepts a JSON request
RUN mode writes structured result JSON
forbidden_scope: no external network call during generation or validation
no claim that v1 runtime already synthesizes final production specifications
